flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marion Technical College rose 148% between 2002 and 2005 ($4.3k → $10.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marion Technical College rose 32% between 2002 and 2005 ($2.1k → $2.8k).
